name: SentinelScan
description: Run SENTINEL AI-powered security and compliance scan on your code changes.
author: SENTINEL

inputs.name: apiUrl
inputs.label: SENTINEL API URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: The URL of your SENTINEL API instance.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.label: API Key
inputs.helpMarkDown: Your SENTINEL API key. Use a secret variable.

inputs.name: secret
inputs.label: HMAC Secret
inputs.helpMarkDown: Your SENTINEL HMAC shared secret. Use a secret variable.

inputs.name: timeout
inputs.label: Timeout (seconds)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum time to wait for scan results.

inputs.name: failOnFindings
inputs.label: Fail on Findings
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fail the task if security findings are detected.
